firesmoke.title: Fire / Smoke
firesmoke.footnote: Baseline mAP50 measured on the original validation set; fine-tuned on the merged cubeai + sayedgamal99 set — different yardsticks, so this is a provisional comparison. Run the same-val-set eval (notebook cell 5) for the airtight numbers. Baseline only has mAP50 recorded (others n/a).

ppe.title: PPE
ppe.footnote: Fine-tuned numbers pending — retrain in progress. Both models evaluate on the same Roboflow v4 validation set, so once the new numbers land this is a direct, valid comparison. Baseline values are overall-only and approximate.
